classes.name: SpeechT5NoLayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + activation; composes from L1/conv1d, L1 act fn (gelu)

classes.name: SpeechT5LayerNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + LayerNorm + activation; composes from L1/conv1d, layer_norm, gelu

classes.name: SpeechT5GroupNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + GroupNorm + activation; composes from L1/conv1d, group_norm, gelu

classes.name: SpeechT5SinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Generates sinusoidal positions; composes from L1/sinusoidal_embed-like math

classes.name: SpeechT5PositionalConvEmbedding
classes.rationale: Conv1d w/ weight_norm + GELU; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/gelu

classes.name: SpeechT5ScaledPositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: Custom scaled sinusoidal pos encoding; no kernel of its own

classes.name: SpeechT5RelativePositionalEncoding
classes.rationale: Relative position embedding via nn.Embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: SpeechT5SamePadLayer
classes.rationale: Slice-based padding adjustment; pure tensor op

classes.name: SpeechT5FeatureEncoder
classes.rationale: Stack of conv layers; wiring class

classes.name: SpeechT5FeatureProjection
classes.rationale: LayerNorm + Linear + Dropout; composes from L1/layer_norm + L1/linear

classes.name: SpeechT5SpeechEncoderPrenet
classes.rationale: Wiring of feature encoder + projection + positional embs; composes

classes.name: SpeechT5SpeechDecoderPrenet
classes.rationale: Stack of Linear+ReLU+dropout layers; composes from L1/linear + L1/relu

classes.name: SpeechT5BatchNormConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv1d + BatchNorm1d + Tanh; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/tanh (no L1 batch_norm1d in kb-nano)

classes.name: SpeechT5SpeechDecoderPostnet
classes.rationale: Wiring of feat_out/prob_out Linear + postnet; composes

classes.name: SpeechT5TextEncoderPrenet
classes.rationale: Embedding + scaled pos encoding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: SpeechT5TextDecoderPrenet
classes.rationale: Embedding + sinusoidal pos; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: SpeechT5TextDecoderPostnet
classes.rationale: Linear LM head; composes from L1/linear

classes.name: SpeechT5Attention
classes.rationale: BART-style multi-head attention with optional T5-like relative position bias added; separate q/k/v/o Linear, BMM-based dot product, LayerNorm-family. No kb-nano file matches (whisper_attention has no rel-pos bias path; t5_attention assumes T5LayerNorm + T5 bucket bias). Decomposes from L1/linear, L1/softmax, L1/dropout, L1/bmm

classes.name: SpeechT5FeedForward
classes.rationale: two-layer FFN: Linear -> GELU -> Linear with dropouts. fc1+fc2 pattern (hidden_act='gelu'); not SwiGLU. Encoder_mlp.py pattern but without the residual+LayerNorm combine; composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: SpeechT5GuidedMultiheadAttentionLoss
classes.rationale: Loss head; not part of inference compute

classes.name: HifiGanResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Conv1d + LeakyReLU residual block; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/leaky_relu

classes.name: SplinterSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear; routes to EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: SplinterAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: SelfAttention + SelfOutput; composes around SplinterSelfAttention

classes.name: SplinterFullyConnectedLayer
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + LayerNorm; composes from L1/linear, L1/gelu, L1/layer_norm

classes.name: QuestionAwareSpanSelectionHead
classes.rationale: QA span head; composes from L1/linear, L1/bmm

classes.name: SqueezeBertEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-like embeddings but uses config.embedding_size (separate from hidden); composes from L1/embedding + L1/layer_norm; not exact EncoderEmbeddingsBase fit (separate embedding_size dim)

classes.name: MatMulWrapper
classes.rationale: Wrapper around torch.matmul for FLOP counting; pure L1/bmm op

classes.name: SqueezeBertLayerNorm
classes.rationale: LayerNorm subclass that permutes NCW<->NWC; uses L1/layer_norm with permute

classes.name: ConvDropoutLayerNorm
classes.rationale: Conv1d + dropout + LayerNorm(residual); SqueezeBert uses grouped 1x1 Conv1d in place of Linear; composes from L1/conv1d + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: ConvActivation
classes.rationale: Conv1d + activation (hidden_act='gelu'); composes from L1/conv1d + L1/gelu

classes.name: SqueezeBertSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Self-attention with Q/K/V as 1x1 grouped Conv1d (not Linear); operates on NCW layout. Doesn't match encoder_attention.py (uses Linear); composes from L1/conv1d + L1/softmax + L1/bmm

classes.name: SqueezeBertModule
classes.rationale: wiring of attention + post_attention + intermediate + output

classes.name: SqueezeBertPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh on [CLS] token; composes from L1/linear + L1/tanh

evidence_lines: squeezebert/modeling_squeezebert.py:157 (SqueezeBertSelfAttention uses grouped Conv1d for QKV)

classes.name: StableLmRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE with partial rotation; produces cos/sin tensors. L1/rotary_emb.py uses fused CUDA kernel with different positional API; partial rotary handled at attention level. Decomposes from cos/sin math

classes.name: StableLmMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU pattern (gate_proj * up_proj after silu). hidden_act='silu'. Matches LlamaMLP (SiluAndMul fused). NOTE: copied-from MistralMLP

classes.name: StableLmLayerNormPerHead
classes.rationale: Per-head LayerNorm via ModuleList of LayerNorms; composes from L1/layer_norm

classes.name: StableLmAttention
classes.rationale: GQA with separate q/k/v Linear (not fused QKV like LlamaAttention), partial RoPE, optional per-head LayerNorm on Q/K, LayerNorm not RMSNorm. Doesn't fit kb-nano L2/attention.py (which assumes fused QKV + RMSNorm). Composes from L1/linear, L1/layer_norm, L1/sdpa

classes.name: Starcoder2MLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer FFN: c_fc -> gelu_pytorch_tanh -> c_proj + dropout. NOT SwiGLU. No fused gate_up. Doesn't fit llama_mlp.py (SwiGLU) or gemma4_mlp.py (gelu_and_mul). Composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu(tanh)

classes.name: Starcoder2Attention
classes.rationale: Inherits MistralAttention but overrides forward and __init__ to add residual_dropout + use_bias QKV. GQA + RoPE. Uses LayerNorm not RMSNorm at decoder layer level. Doesn't fit LlamaAttention (which uses RMSNorm via QKVParallelLinear and fused QKV). Composes from L1/linear, L1/sdpa, L1/rotary_emb

classes.name: SuperGlueMultiLayerPerceptron
classes.rationale: Linear + BatchNorm1d (with permute) + ReLU; composes from L1/linear + L1/relu (no L1 batch_norm1d)

classes.name: SuperGlueSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA with separate q/k/v Linear, supports cross via encoder_hidden_states. NO LayerNorm in self.output (see SuperGlueSelfOutput which has only Linear). Forward routes to encoder_attention.py:EncoderSelfAttention (which has matching compute) — output LayerNorm layer is absent in SuperGlueSelfOutput, so the EncoderAttention wrapper is not a perfect fit for the bare *Attention wrapper. Caveat: SuperGlueSelfOutput is just a Linear (no LayerNorm).

classes.name: SuperGlueSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Just a Linear projection (no LayerNorm); composes from L1/linear (does not match EncoderSelfOutput which adds LayerNorm + residual)

evidence_lines: superglue/modeling_superglue.py:316 (SuperGlueSelfOutput is just Linear, no LN)

classes.name: SuperPointConvBlock
classes.rationale: Two Conv2d + ReLU + optional MaxPool2d; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/relu, L1/max_pool2d

classes.name: SuperPointInterestPointDecoder
classes.rationale: Conv2d + ReLU + softmax + custom keypoint extraction; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/relu, L1/softmax

classes.name: SuperPointDescriptorDecoder
classes.rationale: Conv2d + ReLU + grid_sample + L2 normalize; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/relu, L1/grid_sample, L1/l2_norm

classes.name: SwiftFormerPatchEmbedding
classes.rationale: Two strided Conv2d + BatchNorm + activation; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/batch_norm2d, L1/gelu

classes.name: SwiftFormerDropPath
classes.rationale: Stochastic depth; pure tensor op (training only)

classes.name: SwiftFormerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch downsampling between stages; composes from L1/conv2d

classes.name: SwiftFormerConvEncoder
classes.rationale: Depth-wise Conv2d + BatchNorm + 1x1 Conv2d + GELU + 1x1 Conv2d + DropPath + layer_scale; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/batch_norm2d, L1/gelu

classes.name: SwiftFormerMlp
classes.rationale: MLP via 1x1 Conv2d (NOT Linear): BN + 1x1 Conv2d + GELU + 1x1 Conv2d. Operates in NCHW. hidden_act='gelu' (configurable). Doesn't fit encoder_mlp.py (which uses Linear). Composes from L1/conv2d + L1/batch_norm2d + L1/gelu

classes.name: SwiftFormerEfficientAdditiveAttention
classes.rationale: Custom additive attention: Linear-projected Q/K, learnable w_g vector, sums weighted query, no QKV matmul. Distinct from standard MHA. Composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + L1/l2_norm

classes.name: SwiftFormerLocalRepresentation
classes.rationale: Depthwise Conv2d + BN + 1x1 Conv2d + GELU + 1x1 Conv2d + layer_scale; composes

classes.name: SwiftFormerStage
classes.rationale: wiring (depth-N conv encoders + final encoder block)

classes.name: SwinEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch projection + optional learned absolute pos; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/embedding, L1/layer_norm

classes.name: SwinPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; composes from L1/conv2d

classes.name: SwinPatchMerging
classes.rationale: Patch merging: 4*dim -> 2*dim Linear with norm BEFORE reduction (norm on 4*dim). Differs from SwinV2 (which norms 2*dim AFTER reduction). Doesn't match swinv2_patch_merging.py. Composes from L1/linear, L1/layer_norm

classes.name: SwinSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Window MHA with LEARNED relative position bias TABLE (not cosine attn + CPB MLP like SwinV2). Separate q/k/v Linear. Doesn't match swinv2_window_attention.py (which uses cosine + CPB). Composes from L1/linear, L1/softmax, L1/embedding

classes.name: SwinSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm here, LN is in SwinLayer)

classes.name: SwinIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + activation (hidden_act='gelu' default); composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: SwinLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: window/shift partition + LayerNorm-before/after attention + MLP

evidence_lines: swin/modeling_swin.py:383 (SwinSelfAttention - LEARNED rel pos bias table, not cosine)

classes.name: Swin2SREmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch + position embeddings; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/embedding

classes.name: Swin2SRPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; composes from L1/conv2d

classes.name: Swin2SRPatchUnEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Reshape inverse of patch embeddings; pure tensor op

classes.name: Swin2SRPatchMerging
classes.rationale: Identical to Swinv2PatchMerging (reduction(4*dim->2*dim) then norm on 2*dim); matches SwinV2PatchMerging

classes.name: Swin2SRSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Cosine attention + continuous position bias MLP; identical to Swinv2SelfAttention. Matches SwinV2WindowAttention

classes.name: Swin2SRSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (LN handled at block level)

classes.name: Swin2SRIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + activation (gelu); composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: Swin2SRLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: window attention + post LayerNorm + MLP + post LayerNorm. Similar to SwinV2Block but different in some details (uses input_dimensions pattern, post-norm)

classes.name: Upsample
classes.rationale: Sequential Conv2d + PixelShuffle upsampling; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/interpolate-like ops

classes.name: Swinv2Embeddings
classes.rationale: Patch projection + optional absolute pos; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/embedding, L1/layer_norm

classes.name: Swinv2PatchMerging
classes.rationale: Patch merging with reduction(4*dim->2*dim) then norm on 2*dim. Matches SwinV2PatchMerging exactly

classes.name: Swinv2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: Cosine attention with logit_scale + continuous position bias MLP; matches SwinV2WindowAttention compute (separate q/k/v Linear in HF vs fused qkv in kb-nano, but both equivalent)

classes.name: Swinv2Intermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + activation (gelu); composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: Swinv2Layer
classes.rationale: Window/shift partition + post-norm attention + MLP. Matches SwinV2Block (post-norm residuals, NHWC)

classes.name: Swinv2Stage
classes.rationale: Stage with optional downsample + sequence of blocks. Matches SwinV2Stage

classes.name: Swinv2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level Swinv2 pipeline; matches kb-nano L4 swinv2.py

classes.name: SwitchTransformersTop1Router
classes.rationale: Linear classifier + softmax + argmax + capacity mask. Composes from L1/linear + L1/softmax + custom capacity logic

classes.name: SwitchTransformersLayerNorm
classes.rationale: T5-style RMS norm (no centering, no bias); matches T5LayerNorm

classes.name: SwitchTransformersExperts
classes.rationale: ModuleDict of N expert MLPs with capacity-masked dispatch via index_add_; not a fused MoE kernel like moe_grouped_gemm. Composes from L1/linear + capacity dispatch

classes.name: SwitchTransformersAttention
classes.rationale: T5-style attention with relative_attention_bias bucket. Identical compute to T5Attention. Matches T5SelfAttention (kb-nano version supports relative bias). Caveat: kb-nano file is T5SelfAttention only, no separate cross-attention class for switch

classes.name: SwitchTransformersLayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: wiring: LayerNorm -> Attention -> dropout + residual; matches T5LayerSelfAttention (in L3/t5_block.py)

classes.name: SwitchTransformersLayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: wiring; cross-attention layer (kb-nano t5_block.py only has self-attn variant)

classes.name: SwitchTransformersBlock
classes.rationale: wiring: self-attn + (optional cross-attn) + FF (sparse or dense)

classes.name: T5DenseActDense
classes.rationale: wi -> act (relu, since feed_forward_proj='relu' default) -> wo. Matches T5DenseActDense

classes.name: T5DenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: wi_0 (gate, with act) * wi_1 (up) -> wo. Matches T5DenseGatedActDense

classes.name: T5LayerFF
classes.rationale: T5LayerNorm + Dense{Gated}ActDense + dropout + residual. Matches T5LayerFF in t5_block.py

classes.name: T5Attention
classes.rationale: T5 attention with relative_attention_bias; matches T5SelfAttention (kb-nano supports both has_relative_attention_bias=True/False; supports both self and cross attention since key_value_states forwarded)

classes.name: T5LayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: T5LayerNorm -> T5Attention -> dropout + residual. Matches T5LayerSelfAttention

classes.name: T5LayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: T5LayerNorm -> T5Attention(cross) -> dropout + residual. kb-nano t5_block only has self-attention variant; cross variant not present

classes.name: T5Block
classes.rationale: Self-attention + (optional cross-attention if decoder) + FF. Matches T5Block (encoder variant only in kb-nano)

classes.name: T5EncoderModel
classes.rationale: Encoder-only T5 pipeline; matches kb-nano L4 t5_encoder.py

classes.name: T5GemmaRMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherits Gemma2RMSNorm (1+weight rms norm). Composes from L1/rms_norm with Gemma's '1+weight' style; closest is L1/gemma_rms_norm.py (need verify - generic L1 rms_norm doesn't apply 1+weight)

classes.name: T5GemmaMLP
classes.rationale: Gemma2MLP forward with extra dropout: SwiGLU with gelu_pytorch_tanh. Matches Gemma4MLP (gelu_and_mul tanh fused). Caveat: kb-nano file uses gemma4 naming but compute is same (both gemma2/gemma3 use gelu_pytorch_tanh + gate_up + down)

classes.name: T5GemmaSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits Gemma2Attention; sets is_causal=False for encoder. Gemma2 has q_proj/k_proj/v_proj separate, q_norm/k_norm RMSNorm, soft-capped attn. kb-nano gemma4_attention.py uses fused QKVParallelLinear and includes K==V handling. Compute is similar but interface differs. Composes from L1/linear, L1/rms_norm, L1/rotary_emb, L1/sdpa

classes.name: T5GemmaCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention with separate K/V dim from cross_attention_hidden_size; no kb-nano file for Gemma cross-attention. Composes from L1/linear, L1/rms_norm, L1/sdpa

classes.name: T5GemmaEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre/post LN + self_attn + pre/post LN + MLP + dropout

classes.name: T5Gemma2RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Gemma RMSNorm (1+weight). Composes from L1/gemma_rms_norm-style (verified L1/gemma_rms_norm.py exists)

classes.name: T5Gemma2MLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU gelu_pytorch_tanh + extra dropout (training-only). Matches Gemma4MLP compute (Gemma3 == Gemma2 MLP wrt activation)

classes.name: T5Gemma2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: Gemma3-style attention (separate q/k/v projections, q_norm/k_norm, sliding window per layer). kb-nano gemma4_attention.py is for Gemma4 (uses K==V variant); Gemma3 differs. Composes from L1/linear, L1/rms_norm, L1/rotary_emb, L1/sdpa

classes.name: T5Gemma2MergedAttention
classes.rationale: Custom merged self+cross attention via concatenated K/V. No kb-nano file. Composes from L1/linear, L1/rms_norm, L1/rotary_emb, L1/sdpa

classes.name: T5Gemma2TextScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Scaled word embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TableTransformerConvEncoder
classes.rationale: ResNet-style backbone via timm.create_model; wiring around external timm

classes.name: TableTransformerSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Custom 2D sinusoidal positions; pure tensor math

classes.name: TableTransformerLearnedPositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Learned x/y embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TableTransformerAttention
classes.rationale: DETR-style MHA: separate q/k/v Linear, position embeddings ADDED to Q/K (not RoPE), supports object_queries injection. BMM-based dot product. No kb-nano file matches DETR-style position-injection attention. Composes from L1/linear, L1/bmm, L1/softmax

classes.name: TableTransformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: DETR encoder pre-norm wiring; activation_function='gelu' default

classes.name: TableTransformerDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: DETR decoder pre-norm wiring with self_attn + encoder_attn

classes.name: TableTransformerMLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Stack of Linear + ReLU; composes from L1/linear + L1/relu

classes.name: TapasEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-like embeddings but with MULTIPLE token_type_embeddings_i (one per type_vocab_sizes entry, 7 in default config). Doesn't fit EncoderEmbeddingsBase exactly (which has single token_type_embeddings). Composes from L1/embedding + L1/layer_norm

classes.name: TapasSelfAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-style self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear, supports cross via encoder_hidden_states. Routes to EncoderSelfAttention

classes.name: TapasPooler
classes.rationale: Linear + Tanh on [CLS]; composes from L1/linear + L1/tanh

classes.name: TextNetConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation (relu by default); composes from L1/conv2d, L1/batch_norm2d, L1/relu

classes.name: TextNetRepConvLayer
classes.rationale: Multi-branch RepConv (main + vertical + horizontal + identity) with BatchNorm2d on each branch + ReLU. Similar to RepVGG. kb-nano has rtdetrv2_repvgg_block.py but for RT-DETRv2, not directly applicable. Composes from L1/conv2d + L1/batch_norm2d + L1/relu

classes.name: TimeSeriesFeatureEmbedder
classes.rationale: Categorical feature embeddings; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TimeSeriesSinusoidalPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal pos via Embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TimeSeriesValueEmbedding
classes.rationale: Linear projection of values; composes from L1/linear

classes.name: TimeSeriesTransformerAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style encoder/decoder attention with separate q/k/v Linear, BMM-based dot product. activation_function='gelu' default. No RoPE. Doesn't match LlamaAttention or T5Attention. Composes from L1/linear, L1/bmm, L1/softmax

classes.name: TimesFmMLP
classes.rationale: Custom MLP: layer_norm + Linear + ReLU + Linear + paddings mask + residual. Single gate (no SwiGLU). Doesn't fit any kb-nano L2 MLP. Composes from L1/linear, L1/relu, L1/layer_norm

classes.name: TimesFmResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Linear + SiLU + Linear + parallel residual Linear. Composes from L1/linear + L1/silu

classes.name: TimesFmRMSNorm
classes.rationale: T5-equivalent RMSNorm (no centering, no bias); matches L1/t5_layer_norm.py exactly

classes.name: TimesFmPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal pos embedding; pure tensor math

classes.name: TimesFmAttention
classes.rationale: Custom attention with PER-DIMENSION learnable query scaling (softplus(scaling) * 1.442695041 / sqrt(head_dim)). No RoPE. Separate q/k/v/o Linear. Doesn't match any kb-nano file. Composes from L1/linear, L1/sdpa, L1/softplus

classes.name: TimesFmDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring (no MLP residual at layer; MLP handles its own residual)

classes.name: TimesFm2_5MLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer fc1 -> swish (ACT2FN) -> fc2 (NOT SwiGLU, no gate). activation='swish'. Doesn't match llama_mlp.py (which is SwiGLU). Composes from L1/linear + L1/silu

classes.name: TimesFm2_5ResidualBlock
classes.rationale: Linear + activation + Linear + parallel residual Linear; composes from L1/linear, L1/silu

classes.name: TimesFm2_5RotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard RoPE producing cos/sin. L1/rotary_emb.py uses fused CUDA kernel with positions API; this version is cos/sin -based. Composes

classes.name: TimesFm2_5Attention
classes.rationale: GQA + RoPE + Q/K RMSNorm + per-dim learnable query scaling. Separate q/k/v Linear. Distinct from LlamaAttention. Composes from L1/linear, L1/rms_norm (or t5_layer_norm), L1/rotary_emb-like, L1/sdpa, L1/softplus

classes.name: TimesFm2_5DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: wiring with pre/post RMS norms and no KV cache

evidence_lines: timesfm2_5/modeling_timesfm2_5.py:275 (Attention with QK RMS norm + per-dim q scaling)

classes.name: TimesformerPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; composes from L1/conv2d

classes.name: TimesformerEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Patch + cls token + position + (optional) time embeddings; composes from L1/conv2d, L1/embedding

classes.name: TimesformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Standard MHA with FUSED qkv Linear (qkv_bias configurable). matmul-based dot product, no LayerNorm in this class. Closest is L2/vit_encoder_attention.py (also fused qkv) but Timesformer puts proj on TimesformerSelfOutput (sibling). Composes from L1/linear, L1/softmax (decompose pattern); fused-qkv attention with sibling output

classes.name: TimesformerSelfOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm; LN done at TimesformerLayer level pre-norm). Composes from L1/linear

classes.name: TimesformerIntermediate
classes.rationale: Linear + GELU (hidden_act='gelu') + dropout. Similar to EncoderIntermediate (gelu) but with extra dropout in HF; composes from L1/linear + L1/gelu

classes.name: TimesformerOutput
classes.rationale: Linear + dropout (no LayerNorm; ViT-style not BERT-style). Composes from L1/linear

classes.name: TimesformerLayer
classes.rationale: wiring: pre-norm attention + (optional temporal attention for divided_space_time) + pre-norm MLP. ViT pattern with extra temporal attention

classes.name: TimmBackbone
classes.rationale: Wrapper around timm.create_model — delegates ALL compute to external timm models. No kb-nano implementation. Composes/wraps external library

classes.name: TimmWrapperPreTrainedModel
classes.rationale: Base wrapper for timm models; delegates compute to external timm

classes.name: TimmWrapperModel
classes.rationale: Wrapper around timm.create_model for arbitrary timm classification/feature models. No kb-nano implementation. External library

classes.name: TrOCRLearnedPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Learned position embedding with offset; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TrOCRScaledWordEmbedding
classes.rationale: Scaled word embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: TrOCRAttention
classes.rationale: BART-style attention with separate q/k/v/o Linear, support for kdim/vdim, BMM-based dot product. activation_function='gelu' default. Decoder with KV cache + cross-attention. No fused QKV, no RoPE, no RMSNorm. Closest kb-nano is whisper_attention.py:WhisperDecoderSelfAttention/WhisperCrossAttention but TrOCR has different out_proj layout. Composes from L1/linear, L1/bmm, L1/softmax

classes.name: TvpVisionModel
classes.rationale: Wraps vision backbone; wiring around timm/external

classes.name: TvpVisualInputEmbedding
classes.rationale: Linear + LayerNorm projection of visual features; composes

classes.name: TvpTextInputEmbeddings
classes.rationale: BERT-like text embeddings (word+position+token_type+LayerNorm); similar to EncoderEmbeddingsBase but with different details

classes.name: TvpAttention
classes.rationale: BERT-like self-attention with separate q/k/v Linear COMBINED with a SelfOutput-like dense+layer_norm+dropout in the SAME class (HF unusual fusion). Doesn't fit encoder_attention.py cleanly because EncoderAttention separates self+output; TvpAttention does both in one class. Composes from L1/linear, L1/sdpa-like, L1/layer_norm

evidence_lines: tvp/modeling_tvp.py:324 (TvpAttention combines self+output in single class)

classes.name: UdopPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; composes from L1/conv2d

classes.name: UdopLayerNorm
classes.rationale: T5-style RMS norm (no centering); matches L1/t5_layer_norm.py exactly

classes.name: UdopDenseActDense
classes.rationale: wi -> act (relu by default) -> wo. Matches T5DenseActDense (Udop is direct copy from T5)

classes.name: UdopDenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: wi_0(gate, with act) * wi_1(up) -> wo. Matches T5DenseGatedActDense

classes.name: UdopLayerFF
classes.rationale: T5LayerNorm -> Dense{Gated}ActDense -> dropout + residual. Matches T5LayerFF (in t5_block.py)

classes.name: UdopAttention
classes.rationale: T5 attention with relative_attention_bias bucket (direct copy from T5Attention). Matches T5SelfAttention. Caveat: kb-nano doesn't expose cross-attention variant

classes.name: UdopLayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention layer wrapping; kb-nano doesn't have this variant

classes.name: UdopBlock
classes.rationale: Self-attention + (optional cross-attention) + FF. Matches T5Block (encoder variant)

classes.name: UdopCellEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Custom 2D cell coordinate embedding; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: RelativePositionBiasBase
classes.rationale: Abstract base for relative position bias; ABC class

classes.name: RelativePositionBias1D
classes.rationale: 1D relative position bias; composes from L1/embedding

classes.name: RelativePositionBiasHorizontal
classes.rationale: Horizontal 2D relative bias for layout; composes

classes.name: RelativePositionBiasVertical
classes.rationale: Vertical 2D relative bias for layout; composes

classes.name: UMT5DenseGatedActDense
classes.rationale: wi_0(gate) * wi_1(up) -> wo. Default activation 'gated-gelu' (config feed_forward_proj). Matches T5DenseGatedActDense

classes.name: UMT5LayerFF
classes.rationale: UMT5LayerNorm + Dense{Gated}ActDense + dropout + residual. Matches T5LayerFF

classes.name: UMT5Attention
classes.rationale: T5-style attention BUT relative_attention_bias is learned PER-LAYER (UMT5 sets has_relative_attention_bias=True for every layer; T5 only on first). Same compute kernel; matches T5SelfAttention. Caveat: kb-nano file's compute_bias is identical, but the per-layer pattern is a wiring-level concern

classes.name: UMT5LayerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: UMT5LayerNorm -> Attention -> dropout + residual. Matches T5LayerSelfAttention

classes.name: UMT5LayerCrossAttention
classes.rationale: Cross-attention layer; kb-nano t5_block.py only has self-attn variant

classes.name: UMT5Block
classes.rationale: Self-attn + optional cross-attn + FF. Matches T5Block (encoder variant)
